meaning: 横滨[日本本州岛东南岸港市]
examples: What about driving to Yokohama, he suggests?
The annual rabbit fashion show was held Sunday in Yokohama, Japan.
Horiyoshi the Third, an irezumi master based in Yokohama, is forgiving of the Osaka mayor.
At least two issues are likely to arise at the Yokohama meeting that could stir new criticism.
